Interface Backend<O extends Metamodel.ObjectType, S extends Metamodel.Slotted, M>

Type Parameters:
O - the kind of object type this backend can instantiate
S - the kind of slotted type (object or record) this backend handles
M - the type of model object produced
All Known Implementing Classes:
EcoreModelBuilder
public interface Backend<O extends Metamodel.ObjectType, S extends Metamodel.Slotted, M>
Builds the model as a Simon source is compiled. A backend is a factory of small operation handlers, each performing one model-construction task the compiler requests while walking the parse tree (instantiating elements, setting slot values, attaching children, linking references, and so on). Implementing this interface is how Simon targets a new kind of model output.

    Description
    <P extends Metamodel.Primitive>
    Declaration<P>
    declaration()
    Declares a primitive value.
    Documenting<M>
    documenting()
    Attaches a documentation comment (from a (* ... *) model comment) to a model object.
    <S1 extends S>
    Instantiation<S1>
    instantiation()
    Creates a model object for a declared element.
    <F extends Metamodel.Reference>
    Linking<M,F>
    linking()
    Wires up a reference between model objects.
    NameQuerying<M>
    nameQuerying()
    Reads the name of a model object.
    NameResolution<M>
    nameResolution()
    Resolves a name path to a model object, used to wire references during the resolution pass.
    NameSetting<M>
    nameSetting()
    Sets the name of a model object.
    <C extends Metamodel.Composition>
    Parenting<M,C>
    parenting()
    Attaches an owned child to its parent via a composition.
    <R> R
    runOperation(Operation<R> operation)
    Runs a unit of work in the backend's execution context (for example, within a transaction).
    <L extends Metamodel.Slot>
    ValueSetting<M,L>
    valueSetting()
    Sets the value of a slot (a primitive, enumerated, or record value) on a model object.

  • Method Details

    • nameSetting

      NameSetting<M> nameSetting()
      Sets the name of a model object.

    • documenting

      Documenting<M> documenting()
      Attaches a documentation comment (from a (* ... *) model comment) to a model object.

    • nameQuerying

      NameQuerying<M> nameQuerying()
      Reads the name of a model object.

    • nameResolution

      NameResolution<M> nameResolution()
      Resolves a name path to a model object, used to wire references during the resolution pass.

    • instantiation

      <S1 extends S> Instantiation<S1> instantiation()
      Creates a model object for a declared element. The root flag marks top-level elements.

    • declaration

      <P extends Metamodel.Primitive> Declaration<P> declaration()
      Declares a primitive value.

    • valueSetting

      <L extends Metamodel.Slot> ValueSetting<M,L> valueSetting()
      Sets the value of a slot (a primitive, enumerated, or record value) on a model object.

    • linking

      <F extends Metamodel.Reference> Linking<M,F> linking()
      Wires up a reference between model objects. Performed during the resolution pass, once all elements have been instantiated.

    • parenting

      <C extends Metamodel.Composition> Parenting<M,C> parenting()
      Attaches an owned child to its parent via a composition.

    • runOperation

      <R> R runOperation(Operation<R> operation)
      Runs a unit of work in the backend's execution context (for example, within a transaction).
